TS-001: git commit -m '$(cat <<EOF...)' FAILS in PowerShell 5.1 — heredoc is bash-only. WORKS: Write message to temp file then `git commit -F tempfile`. OR use PowerShell here-string written to file first. Shell: PowerShell 5.1, Platform: Windows.

TS-002: `A && B` FAILS in PowerShell 5.1 — && is not a valid statement separator. WORKS: Use semicolons: `A; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { B }`. OR upgrade to pwsh 7+ where && works natively. Critical for any chained commands in Knight sessions on Windows.

TS-011: PREVENTIVE PROTOCOL — Step 0: when creating ANY new directory or file under librarian-mcp/ or BISHOP_DROPZONE/, FIRST command must be `git check-ignore -v <new-path>`. If it returns a rule, address BEFORE staging. Root .gitignore has blanket rules (*.py, *.json, *.yaml, *.md, *.txt, *.ps1) that catch most files; specific carve-outs needed. Add negation to root .gitignore, commit the .gitignore change BEFORE adding files.

TS-015: Python Unicode print() fails with UnicodeEncodeError in Windows PowerShell (cp1252 encoding). Affects non-ASCII chars: arrows (->), checkmarks, box-drawing chars. FIX: (A) Replace all non-ASCII with ASCII equivalents in print statements. OR (B) Set PYTHONUTF8=1 before running: `$env:PYTHONUTF8=1; python script.py`. Option B preferred for many Unicode symbols.

TS-036: New .py/.ps1/.jsonl files under librarian-mcp/scripts/ or librarian-mcp/stitchpunks/data/ are silently ignored by root *.py rule (~line 232 of .gitignore). Per-file negation (!librarian-mcp/scripts/<filename>.py) needed. Verify with `git check-ignore -v <path>`. K507 precedent: added carve-outs for pawn_with_substrate.py, pawn_with_substrate.ps1, substrate_savings_log.jsonl, synapse_K507.jsonl. Exception block lives around line 404+ in root .gitignore.

TS-039: MCP run_session_start times out when total wall time exceeds default ~30s. FIX: Add env block to ~/.claude/settings.json: `env: MCP_TIMEOUT: '300000', MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT: '600000'` (5min connect / 10min per-tool). Takes effect on next Claude Code launch. Rule: when any MCP tool's typical walltime is >5s, set MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT to >=20x headroom. 'Slow is smooth, smooth is fast.'

TS-053: Wing engine pattern for multi-rule discipline systems. Engine: discipline_wing/engine.py loads Augur configs from ~/.claude/state/wing_augurs/*.json. Evaluate in parallel via ThreadPoolExecutor. Arbitrate via ConsensusLayer (consensus.py). Write append-only telemetry to wing_telemetry.jsonl. Trigger logic: when both file_path_patterns AND text_patterns specified, use AND semantics (not OR — prevents false positives from .md path matches on benign content). Fail-safe: any engine import error -> sys.exit(0).

TS-022: openai.chat.completions.create(model='gpt-5.5', max_tokens=2048) fails with Error 400: 'max_tokens is not supported with this model. Use max_completion_tokens.' Affects gpt-5.5, gpt-5.4-mini. FIX: replace max_tokens=N with max_completion_tokens=N. Backward-compatible: older models (gpt-4o, gpt-4.1) also accept max_completion_tokens without error.

TS-023: Anthropic model IDs. As of 2026-04-25: claude-sonnet-4-6 (no date suffix). Older models used date suffixes (claude-opus-4-7-20240701). Convention changed mid-release. PREVENTION: verify model IDs via anthropic.models.retrieve(name) before benchmark runs. Add both bare name and dated variant to PRICING dict in adapters. K499 empirical: 404 not_found_error on claude-sonnet-4-6-20260301.

Command: `cd librarian-mcp; npm run rebuild`. Runs: 13-stage buildIndex.ts pipeline + stage 14 Knight Cathedral Courier (auto-populates all 4 Knight Scribes). Regenerates: overview.json, useCanonicalStats.ts DEFAULTS (5 canonical fields), KNIGHT_QUEUE.md NEXT/QUEUED/LANDED sections. Run AFTER: editing canonical_values.yaml, adding new BISHOP_DROPZONE prompt files, after any K-session that adds new handoff reports. If stale: run `npm run rebuild:full` to force all 13 stages.

brief_me(task) — single MCP tool call replacing get_system_overview + query_domain + get_architecture + check_consistency. Returns canonical numbers, matched domains (tables, functions, pages), related concepts, applicable rules, past work in ~600 words. Call at every session start with task description. Optional: moneypenny_checklist(task) for pre-flight validation; moneypenny_debrief(session_id, summary) at session end. If Librarian unavailable: read CONTEXT_MANAGEMENT/MILESTONE_HANDOFF_MARCH_2026.md.

Full deploy: `cd platform; npm run build; firebase deploy --only hosting:main,hosting:dotcom,hosting:biz,hosting:org,hosting:net,hosting:the2ndsecond,hosting:hexisle,hosting:upekrithen -P default`. Key: lianabanyan.com uses `hosting:main` (NOT hosting:dotcom). the2ndsecond.com uses `hosting:the2ndsecond`. All portals serve platform/dist/ — one build many targets. Cephas is separate: `cd Cephas/cephas-hugo; hugo --minify; firebase deploy`. PowerShell: use `;` not `&&`. Always `npm run build` BEFORE any firebase deploy.

Augur = individual discipline rule in the Wing system. Config lives at: ~/.claude/state/wing_augurs/<rule-name>.json. Each Augur has: file_path_patterns (path scope), text_patterns (text trigger), action (block/warn/enrich), priority (critical/advisory). AND semantics when both dimensions specified. Wing engine evaluates all Augurs in parallel (ThreadPoolExecutor), consensus arbitrates (block > warn > enrich > allow). Dragonrider escalates borderline warn->block when confidence >= 0.7.

Provisional Patent Application 15 — OPEN (next_prov_number: 14 per canonical_values.yaml, but Wrasse is targeted at Prov 15). Wrasse Scribe is a candidate for Prov 15 inclusion per B132 Founder direction turn 33. Publication gate HARD: all Wrasse results internal-only until Founder Phase E ratification. Filing trigger: Founder's decision after Phase E review. Do NOT file until Founder explicitly triggers.

Session closeout: call moneypenny_debrief(session_id, summary, files_changed, pending_work) at session end. This logs to Knight's Cathedral Scribes via update_session MCP tool. Followed by: git add specific files (not `git add -A`), git commit with Co-Authored-By trailer, git tag v-<description>-K<NNN>, git push. Co-author trailer: `Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>`. Session IDs: single uppercase letter + digits, max 9999, adaptive buffer of 200.
